task_text: P0 Part B: durable SQLite maintenance for scout.db — (1) periodic PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE) with full result-tuple logging and busy handling, (2) PRAGMA incremental_vacuum when freelist exceeds a threshold (auto_vacuum=INCREMENTAL already set), (3) a stale-reader watchdog that scans /proc for non-service processes holding scout.db open beyond N hours and alerts the operator. All in the hourly maintenance loop, behind Settings flags, TDD.
